description: Known issues baseline for L0-L2 deployment audit (Domain 6 input). Issues are maintained externally from the audit design document to avoid hardcoding.

issues.title: VERSION_REGISTRY format mismatch between writers
issues.description: integration-helpers.ts writes VERSION_REGISTRY variants as a flat array (VersionRegistryEntry[]). validate-templates.ts reads variants as a nested object keyed by name (Record<string, Record<string, unknown>>). Running integration-helpers.ts against the current file would corrupt the structure by replacing the nested object with an array.

issues.title: common.lifecycle.json missing co-deck and co-game from propagatedTo
issues.description: The propagatedTo array contains only 5 variants (co-develop, co-work, co-design, co-security, co-consult). co-deck and co-game are missing despite existing as beta variants in templates/.

issues.title: create-l2-scaffold.ts contains markdown fencing artifact on line 2
issues.description: Line 2 contains triple backticks followed by 'typescript' (```typescript). This is a spurious markdown code fence opener baked into the script file. It does not affect bun runtime execution but indicates an accidental artifact from documentation.

issues.title: deploy-to-l1.ts referenced in ADR-0040 but never implemented
issues.description: ADR-0040 defines a dedicated deploy-to-l1.ts for CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, and agents/pm.md L0-to-L1 deployment with section filtering and CONSTITUTION.md reference transforms. The script has never been created. Governance deployment currently relies on propagate-to-templates.ts --governance-l1.

issues.title: No rollback mechanism for L0-to-L1 propagation
issues.description: propagate-to-templates.ts copies files from L0 to L1 without creating backups before writing. The --force flag always overwrites without confirmation. There is no transaction mechanism or snapshot-based rollback capability. If propagation fails mid-way, partially-written files remain.

issues.title: Variant Registry Architecture design document status is 'Proposed' despite implementation
issues.description: The variant-registry architecture design document (5-layer architecture: SSOT Data, Procedural Behavior, Validation Rules, Workspace Integration, Pipeline) has status 'Proposed'. However, the following have been implemented: registries/ directory (4 files), plugins/ directory (3 files), validators/ directory (7+ files), and workspace-integration.ts. Status should be updated to reflect implementation progress.

issues.title: L2 variants cannot auto-sync with L1 improvements (by-design per ADR-0031)
issues.description: ADR-0031 Fork Model Principle 2 intentionally prohibits automatic L1-to-L2 propagation after scaffold-time delivery. L2 variants can fall silently behind L1 improvements. The --check-drift flag provides read-only visibility but no remediation automation. This is an accepted architectural trade-off documented in the ADR.
